name: Salata (Greek Salad)
recipeIngredient: 1 Lettuce head, torn into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub a wooden salad bowl with half of a garlic clove.
2. Wash and prepare the vegetables: tear the lettuce into bite-sized pieces, chop the celery, cut tomatoes into wedges, slice the onion, green pepper, and radishes.
3. Combine all prepared vegetables in the bowl.
4. Add salt, pepper, oregano, olive oil, and vinegar to the salad mixture.
5. Toss gently until well combined.
6. Garnish with ripe olives, anchovies, and crumbled feta cheese.
